# Bankruptcy Exemptions by State -- 2026 Guide
> Compare bankruptcy exemptions across all 50 states. Homestead, vehicle, wildcard, and personal property limits in one chart. Updated for 2026.

## About
bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Exemptions by State -- 2026 Guide: https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/
- Minnesota Federal Exemptions 522 -- Federal vs State Bankruptcy Exemptions: https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/minnesota-federal-exemptions-522.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
